    Show / Hide Table of Contents

    Class ListObject

    Represents an Excel table (structured reference / ListObject).

    Inheritance
    object
    ListObject
    Inherited Members
    object.Equals(object)
    object.Equals(object, object)
    object.GetHashCode()
    object.GetType()
    object.ReferenceEquals(object, object)
    object.ToString()
    Namespace: Aspose.Cells_FOSS
    Assembly: Aspose.Cells.FOSS.dll
    Syntax
    public sealed class ListObject
    Remarks

    Tables provide structured data with built-in filtering, sorting, and styling. They automatically create filters for table headers and support various table styles. Tables can include header rows, total rows, and banding for better readability. Structured references allow you to reference table data by name in formulas.

    Examples
    var workbook = new Workbook();
var worksheet = workbook.Worksheets[0];

// Add sample data
worksheet.Cells["A1"].PutValue("Name");
worksheet.Cells["B1"].PutValue("Age");
worksheet.Cells["A2"].PutValue("Alice");
worksheet.Cells["B2"].PutValue(30);

// Create a table
int tableIndex = worksheet.ListObjects.Add(0, 0, 2, 1, true);
var table = worksheet.ListObjects[tableIndex];
table.DisplayName = "People Data";
table.ShowHeaderRow = true;

    Properties

    Comment

    Gets or sets an optional comment for the table.

    Declaration
    public string Comment { get; set; }
    Property Value
    Type Description
    string

    DisplayName

    Gets or sets the user-visible table name. Must be non-empty and contain no spaces.

    Declaration
    public string DisplayName { get; set; }
    Property Value
    Type Description
    string

    EndColumn

    Gets the zero-based column index of the last column.

    Declaration
    public int EndColumn { get; }
    Property Value
    Type Description
    int

    EndRow

    Gets the zero-based row index of the last row (last data or totals row).

    Declaration
    public int EndRow { get; }
    Property Value
    Type Description
    int

    ListColumns

    Gets the collection of columns in this table.

    Declaration
    public ListColumnCollection ListColumns { get; }
    Property Value
    Type Description
    ListColumnCollection

    ShowHeaderRow

    Gets or sets whether the first row of the table range is a header row.

    Declaration
    public bool ShowHeaderRow { get; set; }
    Property Value
    Type Description
    bool

    ShowTableStyleColumnStripes

    Gets or sets whether alternating column stripes are shown.

    Declaration
    public bool ShowTableStyleColumnStripes { get; set; }
    Property Value
    Type Description
    bool

    ShowTableStyleFirstColumn

    Gets or sets whether the first column receives banding or highlight formatting.

    Declaration
    public bool ShowTableStyleFirstColumn { get; set; }
    Property Value
    Type Description
    bool

    ShowTableStyleLastColumn

    Gets or sets whether the last column receives banding or highlight formatting.

    Declaration
    public bool ShowTableStyleLastColumn { get; set; }
    Property Value
    Type Description
    bool

    ShowTableStyleRowStripes

    Gets or sets whether alternating row stripes are shown.

    Declaration
    public bool ShowTableStyleRowStripes { get; set; }
    Property Value
    Type Description
    bool

    ShowTotals

    Gets or sets whether the last row of the table range is a totals row.

    Declaration
    public bool ShowTotals { get; set; }
    Property Value
    Type Description
    bool

    StartColumn

    Gets the zero-based column index of the first column.

    Declaration
    public int StartColumn { get; }
    Property Value
    Type Description
    int

    StartRow

    Gets the zero-based row index of the first row (header or first data row).

    Declaration
    public int StartRow { get; }
    Property Value
    Type Description
    int

    TableStyleName

    Gets or sets the raw table style name used in the SpreadsheetML tableStyleInfo element. Setting this to a built-in name also updates TableStyleType.

    Declaration
    public string TableStyleName { get; set; }
    Property Value
    Type Description
    string

    TableStyleType

    Gets or sets the built-in table style type. Setting Custom preserves the current TableStyleName.

    Declaration
    public TableStyleType TableStyleType { get; set; }
    Property Value
    Type Description
    TableStyleType

    Methods

    ConvertToRange()

    Removes the table structure, leaving the cell data in place.

    Declaration
    public void ConvertToRange()

    RemoveAutoFilter()

    Hides the autoFilter drop-down buttons from the table header row.

    Declaration
    public void RemoveAutoFilter()

    Resize(int, int, int, int, bool)

    Resizes the table to the specified range, rebuilding columns from header cells.

    Declaration
    public void Resize(int startRow, int startColumn, int endRow, int endColumn, bool hasHeaders)
    Parameters
    Type Name Description
    int startRow
    int startColumn
    int endRow
    int endColumn
    bool hasHeaders

    ShowAutoFilter()

    Shows the autoFilter drop-down buttons on the table header row.

    Declaration
